Off Calendar Jun-07-2023 Continued To Aug-28-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Marlene Getchell appeared by zoom for Sean Quinones.
John Eyrich appeared by zoom for Alma Rendon (co-trustee).
Randal Schmidt appeared by zoom for Maria Valiente and Peggy Rendon.

Discussion was held with attempts to schedule mediation and parties have already agreed on a mediator. The Court will issue an order for parties to participate in mediation. The First Amended Petition for Breach of Fiduciary Duty/Constructive Fraud, etc., the Petition for Determination of Construction of Trust - Real Property, etc., and status of mediation are continued to August 28, 2023 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. File a status of mediation a week before August 28, 2023.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Maloney: Not reported.

Petition For 1. Breach Of Fiduciary Duty/Constructive Fraud; 2. Determination Of Wrongful Taking Of Trust Property And Imposition Of Double Damages; 3. Imposition Of An Equitable Lien; 4. Conversion; 5. Imposition Of Constructive Trust; 6. Removal Of Trustees; And 7. For An Award Of Attorney Fees And Costs
Off Calendar May-01-2023 Continued To Jun-07-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Marlene Getchell appeared by zoom for Sean Quinones.
John Eyrich appeared by zoom for Alma Rendon (co-trustee).
Randal Schmidt appeared by zoom for Maria Valiente and Peggy Rendon.

The parties informed the court that they are returning to mediation at Mr. Schmidt's suggestion and that they are waiting for him to find a mediator. Mr. Schmidt informed the court that he may be substituting out of the case, but that he will not let the momentum of mediation die with him. The First Amended Petition for Breach of Fiduciary Duty/Constructive Fraud, etc., the Petition for Determination of Construction of Trust - Real Property, etc., and status of mediation are continued to June 7, 2023 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. The parties are to file a joint report on status of mediation by May 31, 2023. Mr. Schmidt is responsible for setting up mediation with Mr. Corey.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

Petition Of Maria Valiente And Peggy Rendon For 1. Determination Of Construction Of Trust -- Real Property 2. Determination Of Construction Of Trust -- Personal Property 3. Removal Of Alma Rendon As Co-Trustee 4. Indemnity And Contribution 5. Conversion 6. Order Taxing Share Of Alma Rendon For Any Costs Or Attorney?S Fees Awarded To Sean Quinones
Off Calendar Nov-09-2022 Continued To Jan-18-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Marlene Getchell, via Zoom, for and with Sean Quinonez, Petitioner; Robert Roddick, via Zoom, for and with Peggy Rendon and Maria Valiente, Respondents; John Eyrick, via Zoom, for and with Alma Rendon, Objector.

The court and counsel begin discussing the issue of whether venue is proper. Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to the venue issue with Ms. Getchell and Mr. Eyrich offering advocacy to keep the matter is San Francisco and Mr. Roddick advocating for the transfer of this matter to Santa Clara County. Upon consideration, the court states that it is convinced that venue is proper and advises that the Petition to Transfer the matter to Santa Clara County shall be taken off calendar. The court queries counsel whether this matter is ready for trial. Ms. Getchell advises that it is, no opposition to Ms. Getchell's position is offered. The court advises counsel that it will be issuing a Case Management Order and summarizes some of the directives that will be included within.

After additional discussion, the Petition to Transfer to Santa Clara County is taken off calendar. The remaining subject matters are continued to Jan-18-2023 at 9:00am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Rice. Not Reported.
